hero.headline: Dressed in Intention.
hero.subtext: Premium fashion, beauty, and home essentials — designed for those who choose quality over quantity.

testimonials.quote: The wrap coat has completely redefined my wardrobe. I wear it every day.
testimonials.author: Margaux D.

testimonials.quote: The face oil is the only product I have repurchased more than three times.
testimonials.author: Charlotte H.

testimonials.quote: Everything about these candles is considered — the vessels, the scent, the burn.
testimonials.author: Elena V.
